BHI directly supported and collaborated with the Ministry of Health (MOH) of AB, various members of appointed Cervical Cancer Task Force and other medical key personnel.
StrategicPlanENG: OCM 08: Access to Health Technologies
StrategicPlanSPA: OCM 08: Acceso a tecnologías de salud
DescriptionENG: USP will actively participate in PANDRH network events and working groups as a recognized Non-State Actor, contributing technical expertise on pharmacopeial standards, regulatory science, and quality assurance of medicines and other health technologies. USP will support PAHO in promoting regional dialogue and convergence initiatives through contributions to conferences, consultations, and thematic discussions. USP will promote synergies with other regional and global regulatory platforms.
DescriptionSPA: USP participará activamente en los eventos y grupos de trabajo de la red PANDRH como un Actor No Estatal reconocido, contribuyendo con su experiencia técnica en estándares farmacopéicos, ciencia regulatoria y aseguramiento de la calidad de los medicamentos y otras tecnologías de salud. USP apoyará a la OPS en la promoción del diálogo regional y las iniciativas de convergencia a través de contribuciones a conferencias, consultas y discusiones temáticas. USP fomentará sinergias con otras plataformas regulatorias regionales y globales.
StrategicPlanFRE: OCM 08 : Accès aux technologies de la santé
StrategicPlanPOR: OCM 08: Acesso a tecnologias de saúde
DescriptionFRE: USP participera activement aux événements et groupes de travail du réseau PANDRH en tant qu'Acteur Non Étatique reconnu, en apportant son expertise technique sur les normes pharmacopeiques, la science réglementaire et l'assurance qualité des médicaments et autres technologies de santé. USP soutiendra l'OPS dans la promotion du dialogue régional et des initiatives de convergence par le biais de contributions à des conférences, des consultations et des discussions thématiques. USP favorisera les synergies avec d'autres plateformes réglementaires régionales et mondiales.
DescriptionPOR: A USP participará ativamente dos eventos e grupos de trabalho da rede PANDRH como um Ator Não Estatal reconhecido, contribuindo com expertise técnica em padrões farmacopéicos, ciência regulatória e garantia da qualidade de medicamentos e outras tecnologias de saúde. A USP apoiará a OPAS na promoção de diálogos regionais e iniciativas de convergência por meio de contribuições para conferências, consultas e discussões temáticas. A USP promoverá sinergias com outras plataformas regulatórias regionais e globais.

- Traduction en anglais et en portugais du cours virtuel, lancement et promotion.  
- Contribuer au renforcement et à la diffusion de l'Observatoire sur la Santé Sexuelle dans la Région des Amériques.

ProgressReport: colabioclisede has provided the following results on 12/23/2025 05:21:04 PM: En 2025 COLABIOCLI impulsó acciones académicas y técnicas orientadas a promover la calidad, la acreditación y la mejora continua en los laboratorios clínicos de la región. Se desarrollaron espacios de formación y discusión sobre la Norma ISO 15189:2022, destacando su aplicación en la gobernanza, la gestión de riesgos, los procesos analíticos y la mejora continua. Estas actividades reforzaron la importancia de la certificación y la recertificación profesional como herramientas clave para garantizar competencias, seguridad del paciente y sostenibilidad de los sistemas de laboratorio.

DescriptionENG: FEPAFEM, together with the OPS, will promote the analysis, collaboration, and coordination with processes of regulation and quality accreditation. DescriptionSPA: FEPAFEM, together with the OPS, will promote the analysis, collaboration, and coordination with processes of regulation and accreditation of quality. This aligns with the goal of providing the health personnel system with qualified excellence and social commitment.
StrategicPlanFRE: OCM 09 : Renforcement de la gestion et de la gouvernance

DescriptionFRE: FEPAFEM, en collaboration avec l'OPS, encouragera l'analyse, la collaboration et l'articulation avec les processus de réglementation et d'accréditation de la qualité. Cela s'aligne avec l'objectif de fournir au système de personnel de santé qualifié avec excellence et engagement social.
DescriptionPOR: A FEPAFEM, em conjunto com a OPS, impulsionará a análise, a colaboração e a articulação com processos de regulação e acreditação da qualidade. Isso está alinhado com a meta de fornecer ao sistema de pessoal de saúde qualificado com excelência e compromisso social.

Title: NSA-2025-60-WPA_2
StrategicPlan: OCM 09: Strengthened stewardship and governance
HealthAgenda: Goal 3: Human Resources for Health;Goal 7: Evidence and Knowledge in Health;Goal 4: Health Financing
History: Presidencia Fepafem has created a new workplan activity on 1/5/2026 12:08:34 PM
NSA_x0020_Name: Federación Panamericana de Asociaciones de Facultades y Escuelas de Medicina (FEPAFEM)
Description:
BHI supported PAHO in the scaling up the cervical cancer screening efforts in Antigua and Barbuda (AB):
BHI assisted in reviewing data to plan and conduct the scaling up of the program until full implementation as part of the MOH’s health care services. BHI directly supported and collaborated with the Ministry of Health (MOH) of AB, various members of appointed Cervical Cancer Task Force and other medical key personnel.
StrategicPlanENG: OCM 09: Strengthened stewardship and governance
StrategicPlanSPA: OCM 09: Fortalecimiento de la administración y la gobernanza
DescriptionENG: FEPAFEM will identify and highlight key experiences in medical education with a primary health care approach in the Americas. FEPAFEM will create the Pan American Network of institutions with a curriculum focused on primary health care and interprofessional training with a social commitment, prioritizing vulnerable populations. PAHO will link the actions of the Network with the priorities of its Biennial Work Plan.
DescriptionSPA: FEPAFEM identificará y visibilizará las experiencias clave de educación médica con enfoque de APS en las Américas. FEPAFEM creará la Red Panamericana de instituciones con un enfoque curricular basado en la APS y la formación interprofesional con compromiso social, priorizando poblaciones vulnerables. La OPS vinculará las acciones de la Red con las prioridades de su Plan de Trabajo Bianual.
StrategicPlanFRE: OCM 09 : Renforcement de la gestion et de la gouvernance
StrategicPlanPOR: OCM 09: Fortalecimento da administração e governança
DescriptionFRE: FEPAFEM identifiera et mettra en lumière les expériences clés de l'éducation médicale avec une approche de la santé publique dans les Amériques. FEPAFEM créera le Réseau panaméricain d'institutions avec une approche curriculaire basée sur la santé publique et la formation interprofessionnelle avec un engagement social, en priorisant les populations vulnérables. L'OPS reliera les actions du Réseau aux priorités de son Plan de travail bianuel.
DescriptionPOR: A FEPAFEM identificará e visibilizará as experiências-chave de educação médica com enfoque de APS nas Américas. A FEPAFEM criará a Rede Pan-Americana de instituições com um enfoque curricular baseado na APS e na formação interprofissional com compromisso social, priorizando populações vulneráveis. A OPAS vinculará as ações da Rede com as prioridades de seu Plano de Trabalho Bienal.

History: Presidencia Fepafem has created a new workplan activity on 1/5/2026 12:08:34 PM

Description:
BHI supported PAHO in the scaling up the cervical cancer screening efforts in Antigua and Barbuda (AB):
BHI assisted in reviewing data to plan and conduct the scaling up of the program until full implementation as part of the MOH’s health care services. BHI directly supported and collaborated with the Ministry of Health (MOH) of AB, various members of appointed Cervical Cancer Task Force and other medical key personnel.
StrategicPlanENG: OCM 09: Strengthened stewardship and governance
StrategicPlanSPA: OCM 09: Fortalecimiento de la administración y la gobernanza
DescriptionENG: Strengthen institutional capacities in medical schools to integrate global health into undergraduate and graduate curricula, and promote internships. The goal is to train interprofessional teams with a comprehensive and global vision of health, aligning with the health personnel policies of PAHO for excellence programs.
DescriptionSPA: Fortalecer capacidades institucionales en facultades de medicina para integrar la salud global en currículos de pre y posgrado, e impulsar pasantías. La meta es formar equipos interprofesionales con una visión integral y global de la salud, alineándose con las políticas de personal de salud de la OPS para programas de excelencia.
StrategicPlanFRE: OCM 09 : Renforcement de la gestion et de la gouvernance
StrategicPlanPOR: OCM 09: Fortalecimento da gestão e governança
DescriptionFRE: Renforcer les capacités institutionnelles dans les facultés de médecine pour intégrer la santé mondiale dans les curricula de premier et de deuxième cycle, et promouvoir des stages. L'objectif est de former des équipes interprofessionnelles avec une vision intégrale et globale de la santé, en s'alignant sur les politiques de personnel de santé de l'OPS pour des programmes d'excellence.
DescriptionPOR: Fortalecer as capacidades institucionais nas faculdades de medicina para integrar a saúde global nos currículos de graduação e pós-graduação, e impulsionar estágios. O objetivo é formar equipes interprofissionais com uma visão integral e global da saúde, alinhando-se com as políticas de pessoal de saúde da OPAS para programas de excelência.

Description:
BHI supported PAHO in the scaling up the cervical cancer screening efforts in Antigua and Barbuda (AB):
BHI assisted in reviewing data to plan and conduct the scaling up of the program until full implementation as part of the MOH’s health care services. BHI directly supported and collaborated with the Ministry of Health (MOH) of AB, various members of appointed Cervical Cancer Task Force and other medical key personnel.
StrategicPlanENG: OCM 08: Access to health technologies; OCM 09: Strengthened stewardship and governance
StrategicPlanSPA: OCM 08: Acceso a tecnologías de salud; OCM 09: Fortalecimiento de la gobernanza y la administración
DescriptionENG: 1. Joint coordination actions between PAHO and AIDIS: Strengthen the technical link between PAHO and AIDIS with countries and communities to promote activities and events related to water, sanitation, hygiene, climate change, risk management, solid waste, and air quality. This will be achieved at the regional level and also through the strengthening of the relationship between the national chapters of AIDIS and the PAHO Country Offices.
DescriptionSPA: 1. Joint coordination actions OPS-AIDIS: Consolidate the technical link between OPS and AIDIS with countries and communities to promote activities and events related to water, sanitation, hygiene, climate change, risk management, solid waste, and air quality. This will be achieved at the regional level and also through strengthening the relationship between the national chapters of AIDIS and the Country Offices of OPS.
StrategicPlanFRE: OCM 08 : Accès aux technologies de la santé ; OCM 09 : Renforcement de la gouvernance et de la gestion
StrategicPlanPOR: OCM 08: Acesso a tecnologias de saúde; OCM 09: Fortalecimento da governança e gestão
DescriptionFRE: 1. Actions conjointes de coordination OPS-AIDIS : Consolider le lien technique entre l'OPS et l'AIDIS avec les pays et les communautés, afin de promouvoir des activités et des événements liés à l'eau, à l'assainissement, à l'hygiène, au changement climatique, à la gestion des risques, aux déchets solides et à la qualité de l'air. Cela sera réalisé au niveau régional et également par le renforcement de la relation entre les chapitres nationaux de l'AIDIS et les bureaux de pays de l'OPS.
DescriptionPOR: 1. Ações conjuntas de coordenação OPS-AIDIS: Consolidar o vínculo técnico entre a OPS e a AIDIS com os países e comunidades, para impulsionar atividades e eventos relacionados com água, saneamento, higiene, mudança climática, gestão de riscos, resíduos sólidos e qualidade do ar. Isso será alcançado a nível regional e também através do fortalecimento da relação entre os capítulos nacionais da AIDIS e os Escritórios de País da OPS.

Este processo busca identificar lacunas e oportunidades de melhoria e se baseia em um esforço conjunto iniciado pela OPAS.

Environmental Health Actions in Communities and Municipalities: Disseminate Climate-Resilient Water Safety Plans (WSP) and Sanitation, organize workshops on innovative technologies in water, sanitation, and clean cooking energy, with an emphasis on solutions adapted to climate change, and strengthen national regulatory frameworks related to water quality.
DescriptionSPA: 3. Acciones de Salud Ambiental en Comunidades y Municipios: Difundir los Planes de Seguridad del Agua (PSA) y Saneamiento resilientes al clima, organizar talleres sobre tecnologías innovadoras en agua, saneamiento y energía limpia para cocinar, con énfasis en soluciones adaptadas al cambio climático y fortalecer marcos regulatorios nacionales relacionados con la calidad del agua.

DescriptionPOR: 3. Ações de Saúde Ambiental em Comunidades e Municípios: Difundir os Planos de Segurança da Água (PSA) e Saneamento resilientes ao clima, organizar oficinas sobre tecnologias inovadoras em água, saneamento e energia limpa para cozinhar, com ênfase em soluções adaptadas às mudanças climáticas e fortalecer marcos regulatórios nacionais relacionados à qualidade da água.

Title: NSA-2025-66-WPA_1
StrategicPlan: OCM 04: Response capacity for communicable diseases
HealthAgenda: Goal 10: Communicable Diseases
History: Barb Jones has created a new workplan activity on 1/12/2026 12:48:17 PM
Description:
BHI supported PAHO in the scaling up the cervical cancer screening efforts in Antigua and Barbuda (AB):
BHI assisted in reviewing data to plan and conduct the scaling up of the program until full implementation as part of the MOH’s health care services. BHI directly supported and collaborated with the Ministry of Health (MOH) of AB, various members of appointed Cervical Cancer Task Force and other medical key personnel.
StrategicPlanENG: OCM 04: Response capacity for communicable diseases
StrategicPlanSPA: OCM 04: Capacidad de respuesta para enfermedades transmisibles
DescriptionENG: CLSI will continue its collaboration to strengthen the capacities of the national laboratories in the PAHO region to monitor and mitigate the spread of antimicrobial resistance in bacterial pathogens. Training, regional working group meetings, and the strengthening of surveillance infrastructure will be explored and included as applicable and if feasible. CLSI’s country-based pricing program will continue to be implemented, providing access to CLSI products at discounted prices.
DescriptionSPA: CLSI continuará su colaboración para fortalecer las capacidades de los laboratorios nacionales en la región de la OPS para monitorear y mitigar la propagación de la resistencia a los antimicrobianos en patógenos bacterianos. Se explorarán e incluirán, según corresponda y si es factible, la capacitación, las reuniones de grupos de trabajo regionales y el fortalecimiento de la infraestructura de vigilancia. El programa de precios basado en países de CLSI seguirá implementándose, proporcionando acceso a los productos de CLSI a precios con descuento.
StrategicPlanFRE: OCM 04 : Capacité de réponse aux maladies transmissibles
StrategicPlanPOR: OCM 04: Capacidade de resposta para doenças transmissíveis
DescriptionFRE: CLSI continuera sa collaboration pour renforcer les capacités des laboratoires nationaux dans la région de l'OPS afin de surveiller et d'atténuer la propagation de la résistance aux antimicrobiens dans les agents pathogènes bactériens. La formation, les réunions de groupes de travail régionaux et le renforcement des infrastructures de surveillance seront explorés et inclus si applicable et si faisable. Le programme de tarification basé sur les pays de CLSI continuera d'être mis en œuvre, offrant un accès aux produits de CLSI à des prix réduits.
DescriptionPOR: A CLSI continuará sua colaboração para fortalecer as capacidades dos laboratórios nacionais na região da OPAS para monitorar e mitigar a disseminação da resistência antimicrobiana em patógenos bacterianos. Treinamentos, reuniões de grupos de trabalho regionais e o fortalecimento da infraestrutura de vigilância serão explorados e incluídos conforme aplicável e se viável. O programa de preços baseado em países da CLSI continuará a ser implementado, proporcionando acesso aos produtos da CLSI a preços com desconto.

DescriptionENG: APHA’s American Journal of Public Health (AJPH) continues to collaborate with PAHO’s Pan American Journal of Public Health (PAJPH) to create original content and translate selected articles for publication in the PAJPH, which is published periodically by PAHO and APHA. The inclusion of this activity does not imply a funding commitment from either PAHO or APHA, and it will be conducted based on available funding/resources.
DescriptionSPA: El American Journal of Public Health (AJPH) de la APHA continúa colaborando con el Pan American Journal of Public Health (PAJPH) de la OPS en la creación de contenido original, así como en la traducción de artículos seleccionados para su publicación en el PAJPH, que es publicado por la OPS y la APHA de manera periódica. La inclusión de esta actividad no constituye un compromiso de financiamiento por parte de la OPS o la APHA, y se llevará a cabo en función de los fondos y recursos disponibles.
StrategicPlanFRE: OCM 07 : Main-d'œuvre en santé ; OCM 21 : Données, informations, connaissances et preuves ; OCM 22 : Recherche, éthique et innovation pour la santé
StrategicPlanPOR: OCM 07: Força de trabalho em saúde; OCM 21: Dados, informações, conhecimento e evidência; OCM 22: Pesquisa, ética e inovação para a saúde
DescriptionFRE: Le Journal américain de santé publique (AJPH) de l'APHA continue de collaborer avec le Journal panaméricain de santé publique (PAJPH) de l'OPS pour créer du contenu original ainsi que pour traduire certains articles en vue de leur publication dans le PAJPH, publié par l'OPS et l'APHA de manière périodique. L'inclusion de cette activité ne constitue pas un engagement de financement de la part de l'OPS ou de l'APHA, et elle sera réalisée en fonction des financements et ressources disponibles.
DescriptionPOR: O Jornal Americano de Saúde Pública (AJPH) da APHA continua a colaborar com o Jornal Pan-Americano de Saúde Pública (PAJPH) da OPAS na criação de conteúdo original, bem como na tradução de artigos selecionados para publicação no PAJPH, publicado pela OPAS e pela APHA de forma periódica. A inclusão desta atividade não constitui um compromisso de financiamento por parte da OPAS ou da APHA, e será realizada com base nos recursos/financiamentos disponíveis.

Title: NSA-2025-51-WPA_4

HealthAgenda: Goal 3: Human Resources for Health;Goal 6: Information Systems for Health;Goal 7: Evidence and Knowledge in Health;Goal 11: Health Inequalities and Inequities
History: vina.hulamm has created a new workplan activity on 1/12/2026 12:50:25 PM
Description:
BHI supported PAHO in the scaling up the cervical cancer screening efforts in Antigua and Barbuda (AB):
BHI assisted in reviewing data to plan and conduct the scaling up of the program until full implementation as part of the MOH’s health care services. BHI directly supported and collaborated with the Ministry of Health (MOH) of AB, various members of appointed Cervical Cancer Task Force and other medical key personnel.
StrategicPlanENG: OCM 07: Health workforce; OCM 21: Data, information, knowledge, and evidence; OCM 22: Research, ethics, and innovation for health
StrategicPlanSPA: OCM 07: Fuerza laboral de salud; OCM 21: Datos, información, conocimiento y evidencia; OCM 22: Investigación, ética e innovación para la salud
DescriptionENG: PAHO and APHA plan to identify timely public health topics/issues based on both organizations’ areas of interest, expertise, and available resources. We aim to proactively identify opportunities where organizational collaboration can help achieve mutual goals and enhance impact. Some examples of areas both organizations are interested in exploring further include health equity, climate change, vaccines, non-communicable diseases (NCDs), digital health technology, and other emerging health issues as they arise.
DescriptionSPA: La OPS y la APHA planean identificar temas/problemas de salud pública de manera oportuna, basándose en las áreas de interés, experiencia y recursos disponibles de ambas organizaciones. Planeamos identificar proactivamente oportunidades donde la colaboración organizacional pueda ayudar a alcanzar objetivos mutuos y fortalecer el impacto. Algunos ejemplos de áreas que ambas organizaciones tienen interés en explorar más a fondo son: equidad en salud, cambio climático, vacunas, enfermedades no transmisibles, tecnología de salud digital y otros problemas de salud emergentes a medida que surjan.
StrategicPlanFRE: OCM 07 : Main-d'œuvre en santé ; OCM 21 : Données, informations, connaissances et preuves ; OCM 22 : Recherche, éthique et innovation pour la santé
StrategicPlanPOR: OCM 07: Força de trabalho em saúde; OCM 21: Dados, informações, conhecimento e evidências; OCM 22: Pesquisa, ética e inovação para a saúde
DescriptionFRE: L'OPS et l'APHA prévoient d'identifier des sujets/problèmes de santé publique en temps opportun, en fonction des domaines d'intérêt, d'expertise et des ressources disponibles des deux organisations. Nous prévoyons d'identifier de manière proactive des opportunités où la collaboration entre les organisations peut aider à atteindre des objectifs mutuels et à renforcer l'impact. Quelques exemples de domaines que les deux organisations souhaitent explorer davantage : l'équité en santé, le changement climatique, les vaccins, les maladies non transmissibles, la technologie de la santé numérique et d'autres problèmes de santé émergents au fur et à mesure qu'ils se présentent.
DescriptionPOR: A OPAS e a APHA planejam identificar tópicos/questões de saúde pública de forma oportuna, com base nas áreas de interesse, expertise e recursos disponíveis de ambas as organizações. Planejamos identificar proativamente oportunidades onde a colaboração organizacional pode ajudar a alcançar objetivos mútuos e fortalecer o impacto. Alguns exemplos de áreas que ambas as organizações têm interesse em explorar mais a fundo incluem - equidade em saúde, mudanças climáticas, vacinas, doenças não transmissíveis (DNTs), tecnologia de saúde digital e outras questões de saúde emergentes à medida que surgem.

NSA_x0020_Name: Federación Panamericana de Profesionales de Enfermería (FEPPEN)
Description:
BHI supported PAHO in the scaling up the cervical cancer screening efforts in Antigua and Barbuda (AB):
BHI assisted in reviewing data to plan and conduct the scaling up of the program until full implementation as part of the MOH’s health care services. BHI directly supported and collaborated with the Ministry of Health (MOH) of AB, various members of appointed Cervical Cancer Task Force and other medical key personnel.
